title: Trails and Trips
description: This datapack improves horses, camels, sniffers, undead horses and llamas!
body:
Main Information
===
* Creator and Developer: [​MC Silver]
* Minecraft Versions: 1.20+
* WIKI Version: 26.1v1
* For datapack developers: My datapack ignores all mobs that use data! (1.21.5+) \
  For custom mobs, use data; for non-custom mobs, use tags/scores!
* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters): \
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings. \
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file. \
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true

Commands
=== 
All commands available to the player starts with /function .
---
Menu
---
- /function .menu:mcs_trails_and_trips

Give
---
- /function .give:mcs_trails_and_trips/"item_name"

Uninstall
---
- /function .uninstall:mcs_trails_and_trips

Mobs
===
General
---
* You won't dismount from mobs in water
* You can see stats of mobs on saddle

Camel
---
* You can mount mobs on it if they are leashed
* You can mount Villagers and Wandering Traders on it while riding with an Emerald or Emerald Block
* You can dismount a mob from it by sneaking near it
* Step height increased from 1.5 to 2 blocks
* 50% reduced burning time
* Max health increased from 32 to 40 points
* Movement speed increased by 50%

Donkey
---
* Movement speed increased by 50%

Happy Ghast
---
* You can mount mobs on it if they are leashed
* You can mount Minecarts on it if it leashed
* You can mount Villagers and Wandering Traders on it while riding with an Emerald or Emerald Block
* You can dismount a mob from it by sneaking near it
* Flying speed increased by 20%
* Flying speed decreases by 5% per passenger
* Flying speed increases by 15% during rain
* Flying speed increases by 30% at cloud level
* Potion effects now affect its flying speed
* Added stamina system
* Has 20 stamina points
* Each second while flying, there is a 10% chance to lose 1 stamina point and reduce flying speed by 1.7%
* While stopped, there is a 50% chance per second to regain 1 stamina point
* When stamina is fully restored, it emits a happy sound and green "happy" particles
* Happy Ghast temper range increased from 16 to 32 blocks

Horse
---
* Increased speed by 50%
* Horse armor can now be enchanted with Chest and Boots enchantments
* Horse armor loses durability
* Maximum horse base speed: 76.1 km/h
* Maximum horse base jump height: 5.9 meters

Llama
---
* Llama spit now creates an area effect that slows entities for 1 second
* Now have strong passive regeneration
* Spawns with 50% more health and speed
* You can mount mobs on it similar to a camel, but the llama must be leashed:
* Now have a new ground attack
1. The llama must have a carpet equipped but no chest
* You can dismount a mob from it by sneaking near the llama
* Can transport the following mobs:
1. Cat, Chicken, Cow, Fox, Frog, Mooshroom, Ocelot, Parrot, Pig, Rabbit, Sheep, Snow Golem, Strider, Villager, Wandering Trader, Goat, Copper Golem and Wolf

Mule
---
* Movement speed increased by 50%
* Maximum mule base speed: 76.1 km/h
* Maximum mule base jump height: 5.9 meters

Zombie Horse
---
* Movement speed increased by 50%
* Zombie Horses rarely heal their passengers

Skeleton Horse
---
* Movement speed increased by 50%
* Skeleton Horses run faster on soul sand
* Riding a Skeleton Horse deflect arrows with a 99% chance
* Each level of Piercing increases the chance to penetrate the Skeleton Horse’s protective aura by 10%
* Skeleton Horsemen no longer attack each other after accidentally hitting one another with arrows
* Are attacked by Wild Wolves
* Spawns with a 0.96% chance instead of a skeleton (on world surface)
  
Undead Transport Mobs
---
* Undead Transport Mobs are: Zombie Horse, Skeleton Horse, Zombie Nautilus and Camel Husk
* Zombies and Skeletons can ride undead transport mobs if they don’t have a saddle
* Better armored undead jockeys!

Sniffer
---
* Sniffer has 75% chance to find ancient seed
* Sniffer can sniff extra flowers with 35% chance [​Overworld]
* Sniffer finds trails ruin treasure with 5% chance [​Overworld]
* Sniffer can find map of the nearest structure while digging with 1% chance
* Sniffer finds the ancient maps in the overworld and nether dimensions
* The Sniffer can also dig in sand, red sand, gravel, soul sand, crimson nylium, warped nylium and sculk

Nautiluses
---
* Increased Nautilus health from 15 to 30 points
* Increased Zombie Nautilus health from 15 to 24 points
* Increased speed by 10%
* Drain Hunger on their riders
* Restore health passively
* Nautilus Armor can now be enchanted with Chest enchantments
* Nautilus Armor loses durability
* Riding a Zombie Nautilus deflect tridents with an 80% chance
* Each level of Impaling increases the chance to penetrate the Zombie Nautilus’ protective aura by 5%
* Maximum Nautilus base speed: 25.7 km/h
* Maximum Zombie Nautilus base speed: 28.3 km/h

Camel Husk
---
* 50% increased burning time
* Movement speed increased by 60%
* Cannot transport entities
* Removes Hunger and Weakness effects from their passengers
  
Blocks
===
​Fluid Warped Wart Cauldron
---
* You can make new potions in cauldron
* You can take items from warped cauldron, if you sneak
1. Fill cauldron with water
2. Drop warped wart block inside it
3. Place magma block under it
4. Drop potion and ingredients in cauldron

[Potions]
1. Torchflower Seeds --> Potion of Haste [​03:00]
2. Pitcher Pod --> Potion of Hunger [​01:30]
3. Torchflower --> Potion of Glowing [​03:00] + Night Vision [​04:30]
4. Pitcher Plant --> Potion of Blindness [​00:45]
5. Wither Rose --> Potion of Decay [00:40]

* Gunpowder (converts potion in to a splash potion)
* Dragon's Breath (converts splash potion in to a lingering potion)
* Redstone Dust (increases potion duration)
* Glowstone Dust (increases potion strength) [​Haste, Decay and Hunger only]

* Ingredients are consumed with a 33% chance
* Water level decreases with a 9% chance
* Magma block under cauldron gets cold with a 3% chance

​Items
===
​Treasure Map
---
* Now you see the coordinates of the destination in the hud, if you hold map in mainhand
